column1: # CasPEX input manifest
# One row per tiled gRNA region. Columns (tab-separated):
#   region     Region label used throughout the pipeline (R1, R2, ...).
#              Must be unique. Case-sensitive.
#   sequence   Protospacer (17-23 bp). PAM (NGG / CCN) is optional; the
#              loader strips it. Use NA (uppercase) if a region has no
#              matched gRNA sequence — the pipeline will still use its
#              logFC data but plot no cut-site tick for it.
#   data_file  Filename of the logFC / differential-expression table for
#              that region, RELATIVE to this inputs/ directory. The file
#              must be tab-delimited with a header and must contain
#              columns identifiable as name / logFC / P.Value (plus the
#              optional moderated-t column `t` and the `TFDatabase` flag).
# Lines starting with '#' are comments. Blank lines are ignored.
region
R1
R2
R3
R4
R5
R6
R7
